title: Good Services Canvas
description: Service entries (bounded contexts for software, content architecture for content products) with optional XAI quality dimensions per service when ai_components.detected is true. Permissive: empty services array is valid (canvas often starts empty); only id+name required when a service exists.

xai.description: XAI quality dimensions for AI-containing services. Populated by /xai-check when active-stack.yml :: ai_components.detected is true. Optional — absence means /xai-check has not been run for this service or service has no AI components.

tier.description: EU AI Act risk tier (Annex III + Art. 50 routing). Set by /xai-check Stage 1, ideally read from /regulatory-review's prior classification.

last_assessed_at.description: ISO timestamp of last /xai-check run for this service.

surfaces.description: Per-stakeholder explanation surface assessment (Liao et al. 2020 question matrix). Each stakeholder maps question categories (output, why, why_not, input, how_to_be_that, what_if, performance) to pass / partial / fail / N-A.

recourse.description: Recourse path for users contesting AI-driven outputs (Selbst & Barocas 2018 — substance check).

fidelity.description: Empirical audit that surfaced rationales actually drove the surfaced decisions (Lanham et al. 2023). Aggregate stats; raw samples live under .claude/evals/xai-fidelity/<service>/YYYY-MM-DD.json.

system_card.description: Reference to the published AI System Card (Mitchell et al. 2019) for this service.

validated_functionally.description: List of stages the /xai-check run validated via static analysis only. Honesty rule per Doshi-Velez & Kim 2017 — distinguishes from items that need user-grounded validation.

needs_user_testing.description: List of stages or specific findings that require application-grounded validation (real users, real tasks). Static check is insufficient.

principles.description: Downe's 15 principles assessment block. Permissive — existing canvas uses this without strict per-field requirements.
